name: Chocolate Caramel Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the vanilla waffle crumbs and melted butter. Press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. Microwave the caramels and evaporated milk on high for 4 to 5 minutes, or until melted, stirring every minute. Alternatively, melt in a bowl over simmering water or in a double boiler, stirring occasionally.
4. Pour the melted caramel mixture over the crust.
5. Top with chopped pecans.
6. Beat the softened cream cheese and sugar together until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition. Blend in the melted chocolate and vanilla.
7. Pour the batter over the pecans.
8. Place the pan on a cookie sheet. Bake at 325°F for 40 minutes.
9. Turn off the oven and let the cake cool in the oven for 1 hour.
10. Remove from the oven and loosen the cake from the rim of the pan. Cool completely before removing the rim of the pan.
11. Refrigerate. Garnish with whipped cream and caramel sauce, if desired.
